◎简　　介  

　　The Name of the Game is a feature-length documentary about the team up between the legendary arcade game designer, Eugene Jarvis, and the Finnish game developer, Housemarque. During their transatlantic quest for the ultimate gaming experience, the newcomers learn a thing or two from the master of pixel explosions, and vice versa.
